name: The Summer We Met
original_name: เกิด/แก่/เจ็บ/โต
overview: After getting caught using AI on her homework, Jan must spend her time during summer break helping out at an elderly care home. There, she meets kind elders who befriend her, except for Nok, a senior author whom she seems not to get along well with. Because of his broken arm, Jan is hired to type a novel for him.

trailers.title: [Official Trailer] เกิด แก่ เจ็บ โต
